title: We make immigration work for you. — ELLIS PORTER
content:
Temporary Business, Work & Investment Visas | Employment Based Green Cards | Industry Specific Immigration Solutions | Occupation Specific Immigration Solutions | Immigration Compliance for Employers | US Expansion Services

## Temporary Business, Work & Investment Visas
When it comes to working, investing or doing business in the U.S., there are several visa options. But figuring out the right one for you can be a challenge.  That's where we come in.
Ellis Porter provides the following business visa, work visa and investment visa services:

### Temporary Business Visas
- B-1 Visa for Business Visitors
B-1 Visa for Business Visitors

### Temporary Work Visas
- E-3 Visas for Australian Professionals
E-3 Visas for Australian Professionals

H-1B Visas for Specialty Occupation Professionals
- H-2B Visas for Temporary/Seasonal Workers
H-2B Visas for Temporary/Seasonal Workers
- J-1 Visas for Exchange Visitors
J-1 Visas for Exchange Visitors
- L-1A Visas for Intracompany Transfers: Managers and Executives
L-1A Visas for Intracompany Transfers: Managers and Executives

L-1B Visas for Intracompany Transfers: Specialized Knowledge

O-1 Visas for Extraordinary Ability Individuals

P Visas for Athletes, Artists & Entertainers

## Employment Based Green Cards
If your career plans have you thinking about living and working in the U.S. permanently, then it's time to talk about your green card options.
Ellis Porter provides the following employment based green card services:
- Green Cards for Extraordinary Ability Individuals (EB-1A)
Green Cards for Extraordinary Ability Individuals (EB-1A)
- Green Cards for Outstanding Researchers and Professors (EB-1B)
Green Cards for Outstanding Researchers and Professors (EB-1B)
- Green Cards for Multinational Executives & Managers (EB-1C)
Green Cards for Multinational Executives & Managers (EB-1C)
- PERM Labor Certification Based Green Cards (EB-2/EB-3)
PERM Labor Certification Based Green Cards (EB-2/EB-3)
- National Interest Waiver Green Cards (EB-2)
National Interest Waiver Green Cards (EB-2)
- Physician National Interest Waiver Green Cards (EB-2)

- "Schedule A" Green Cards for Nurses & Physical Therapists (EB-2/EB-3)
"Schedule A" Green Cards for Nurses & Physical Therapists (EB-2/EB-3)
- Green Cards for Religious Workers and Special Immigrants (EB-4)
Green Cards for Religious Workers and Special Immigrants (EB-4)
- Green Cards for Immigrant Investors (EB-5)
Green Cards for Immigrant Investors (EB-5)

## Immigration Compliance for Employers
As an employer, the immigration rules and obligations you must comply with can seem incredibly complex. We help employers navigate the immigration compliance maze with ease and protect against unwanted liability.
Ellis Porter provides the following immigration compliance and policy guidance services for employers:
- Mergers & Acquisitions
Mergers & Acquisitions
- Immigration Policy Development
Immigration Policy Development

## US Expansion Services & Support
Ellis Porter’s US Expansion team helps international companies develop immigration legal strategies to set up and staff new business operations in the US market. Learn more
